const FantasyScoringTable = () => { return(

Scoring

Player GK Def Mid Str
Apps 2 2 2 2
Goals 6 6 5 4
Assist 3 3 3 3
GSOs 1 1 1 1
Shots 1 1 1 1
Clean Sheets 4 4 1 0
) } export default FantasyScoringTable;
